overview.title: Dashboard
overview.dailyActivityDesc: View session count and activity strength by date.
overview.moduleOverviewDesc: Combined status for account management, thread management, and relay injection.
overview.analyticsEmptyDesc: This panel waits for usageAnalytics in the bootstrap cache.
overview.apiUnreachableHint: Data will refresh automatically after connectivity recovers.

pilot.accountsDesc: Manage Codex account login, switching, quota monitoring, and automatic rotation.
pilot.sessionsDesc: Scan local Codex session files and show thread source, working directory, and file size by update time.
pilot.relayDesc: Manage relay station API credentials, Base URLs, model lists, and injection status, then write the controlled profile into Codex config.toml.
pilot.routingDesc: Manage relay models and inject the PPToken router profile into Codex config.toml.
pilot.readOnlyPhase: Write actions are available with local backups.

sessions.detailDesc: Inspect this thread's origin, workspace, branch nodes, message count, and local JSONL path.
sessions.sessionListDesc: Codex local JSONL sessions grouped by project. Delete moves a file into the archive folder first.
sessions.searchPlaceholder: Search thread ID, workspace, origin, model route, or file path
sessions.recoverConfirmDesc: This restores session files from the archive folder into sessions. If Codex is currently reading or writing those files, close the related window before continuing.
sessions.bulkDeleteConfirmDesc: Move the selected {{count}} sessions to the archive folder?

accounts.addAccountDesc: This will log out of the current Codex account, wait for you to sign in again, and sync the new account into the account list automatically.
accounts.addAccountHint: Suggested flow: log in or switch to the account in Codex, return to PPToken, then click Rebuild. The current auth.json will be synchronized into an account snapshot for later switching, export, or removal.
accounts.addAccountStartedDesc: Sign in to the new account, then refresh to sync it into the account list.
accounts.openRegistryFolderDesc: Requested opening the account registry location.
accounts.accountListDesc: Indexed local Codex login snapshots. API-key accounts show the matching relay station when one is found.
accounts.importTooltip: Restore or merge accounts from a backup file
accounts.exportTooltip: Package all current accounts into a backup file
accounts.searchPlaceholder: Search email, alias, workspace, account key
accounts.enhancedRefreshDoneDesc: Rebuilt {{count}} account indexes and triggered one local refresh at {{time}}.
accounts.detailDesc: View the local account snapshot, quota state, matching relay station, and copyable account identifiers.
accounts.staleDataDesc: API connectivity is currently unavailable, so account quotas are showing cached local data.
accounts.removeConfirmDesc: Delete the local snapshot for {{account}}? This will not delete the platform account. It only removes the auth snapshot stored on this device.
accounts.exportConfirmDesc: This will package {{count}} saved accounts on this device into one backup file. The file contains credentials that can sign in to those accounts, so keep it private.
accounts.exportImpactFile: Creates an importable account backup JSON file.
accounts.exportImpactSecrets: The backup includes OAuth tokens / API keys and is equivalent to the accounts themselves.
accounts.exportImpactShare: Do not share it through chat apps, public cloud drives, or email attachments.
accounts.exportImpactStore: Store it on an encrypted disk / password manager and destroy it when expired.
accounts.exportImpactImportable: The exported file can migrate the account list on this device or another device.
accounts.bulkRemoveConfirmDesc: Delete the selected {{count}} accounts from the local PPToken registry and snapshots?
accounts.importPreviewDesc: Check the accounts in the backup file before overwriting local matches.
accounts.noPreviewAccounts: No importable accounts found in the backup file
accounts.importCancelledDesc: No account backup file was selected.
accounts.switchConfirmDesc: PPToken will replace the current auth snapshot with {{account}}. Codex will restart to apply the account.
accounts.restartSwitchConfirmDesc: This switches to {{account}} and then restarts the local Codex app. Ongoing work may be interrupted.
accounts.logoutConfirmTitle: Log out of the current account?
accounts.logoutConfirmDesc: This backs up the current auth.json and removes the active login state.
accounts.rebuildConfirmDesc: This rescans local account snapshots and refreshes the registry.
accounts.restartSwitchDoneDesc: Switched to {{account}} and requested a Codex restart.
accounts.logoutDoneDesc: Current auth.json has been backed up and removed.

routing.providerDialogDesc: Add an OpenAI-compatible or Anthropic-compatible upstream model route for Codex routing.
routing.invalidHeadersDesc: Extra headers must be a JSON object.

relay.providersDesc: Model routes here are written into the Codex Router catalog and used as upstream routes for Codex requests.
relay.searchPlaceholder: Search name, route ID, Base URL, model, or error
relay.detailDesc: Inspect this relay model's protocol, network, health, model catalog, headers, and latest error.
relay.modelCatalogDesc: View fetched models for this route and set one as the default model.
relay.modelCatalogEmpty: No model catalog yet. Fetch models first.
relay.modelCatalogRefreshHint: Select a model to make it the default for this route.
relay.modelSelectedDesc: {{model}} was written into this relay model.
relay.providerNamePlaceholder: OpenAI official, Claude relay, team gateway
relay.providerDialogDesc: Configure an upstream model route. Saving updates the relay model list and can be activated for Codex Router.
relay.providerPresetsDesc: Fill common upstream URL, default model, wire API, and network mode in one click. API key stays blank.
relay.providerPresetAppliedDesc: {{provider}} route information was filled. Enter the API key manually.
relay.recommendedStationsDesc: Quickly fill name and Base URL from sponsor relay stations. Users still enter their own API key.
relay.recommendedStationsDialogDesc: Select a relay station to view its introduction, registration link, and offer. Confirm to fill the model form.
relay.recommendedAppliedDesc: {{station}} name and Base URL were filled. Enter the API key manually.
relay.modelPresetAppliedDesc: {{model}} was filled and the wire API was synced.
relay.chooseRecommendedStationDesc: Details, registration links, and offers will appear here. Empty sponsor slots cannot be applied yet.
relay.routerConsoleDesc: Routes Codex model requests through the controlled local profile.
relay.stepProviderDesc: Name the upstream route and fill the base URL.
relay.stepInjectDesc: Save and sync controlled config plus model catalog.
relay.providerDialogHint: Use OpenAI Responses for OpenAI-compatible upstreams. Use Anthropic Messages for Claude-compatible upstreams.
relay.modelSourceDesc: The upstream route Codex Router will identify, display, and forward to.
relay.modelAuthDesc: The API key is stored locally; the default model is written into the active profile.
relay.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep stored key
relay.protocolAndNetworkDesc: Controls request translation and whether upstream traffic follows the system proxy.
relay.preflightDesc: Creates a temporary draft route from the current form, tests it, then removes the draft so the official relay list stays clean.
relay.preflightPending: This form has not been tested yet. Test connectivity before saving it as a relay model.
relay.preflightPassed: {{provider}} draft test passed. It is ready to save.
relay.preflightFailed: {{provider}} draft test failed. Check Base URL, API key, protocol, and model name.
relay.draftTestMissingFields: Fill route ID, display name, Base URL, and default model first.
relay.extraHeadersDesc: Optional. Must be a JSON object and will be sent with upstream requests.
relay.routerEnabledDesc: Codex Router is back online and can route traffic.
relay.routerDisabledDesc: Codex Router is disabled and will no longer handle requests.
relay.providerDeactivatedDesc: {{provider}} was removed from enabled relay models.
relay.diagnosticsReadyDesc: Generated the current relay injection status report.
relay.diagnosticsNeedsAttention: This relay injection setup needs attention.
relay.repairDoneDesc: Tried to repair the relay injection configuration.
relay.enableRouterConfirmDesc: Codex Router will start handling relay routing after this change.
relay.disableRouterConfirmDesc: Codex Router will stop handling requests after this change.
relay.repairConfirmDesc: Repair verifies Relay State, Model Catalog, and the managed Codex profile. Use it when routing state looks broken or config is missing.
relay.importConfirmDesc: Import restores relay models from a local JSON file, then syncs the model catalog and active managed profile.
relay.exportConfirmDesc: Export writes the current relay models, route state, and managed paths to a local JSON backup.
relay.deactivateConfirmDesc: After disabling {{provider}}, it will not participate in Codex Router routing. If it is active, the current profile will be synced.
relay.confirmImpactConfig: Checks and rewrites the PPToken managed block in Codex config.toml.
relay.confirmImpactProfile: Syncs the active Codex Router profile and default model.
relay.confirmImpactRouteOn: When enabled, Codex requests will enter the local relay injection route first.
relay.confirmImpactRouteOff: When disabled, Codex requests will no longer enter the local relay injection route.
relay.confirmImpactState: Corrects Relay State enabled status, active provider, and proxy status.
relay.confirmImpactCatalog: Regenerates the Model Catalog from relay models.
relay.confirmImpactImportState: Updates the local relay list from the imported file.
relay.confirmImpactExportFile: Creates a relay config JSON backup that can be imported again.
relay.confirmImpactExportSecrets: The export includes locally saved relay model config. Keep the backup file private.
relay.confirmImpactProviderDisabled: This relay model is marked disabled and removed from enabled routes.
relay.invalidHeadersDesc: Extra headers must be a JSON object.

mcp.title: MCP Console
mcp.description: Manage Codex MCP entries directly in PPToken.
mcp.name: Name
mcp.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this MCP server?
mcp.pathCopiedDesc: The MCP config file path was copied to the clipboard.

skills.title: Skills Management
skills.description: Import, remove, backup and restore local Codex skills directly in PPToken.
skills.pathCopiedDesc: The path text was copied to the clipboard.
skills.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this skill? A backup will be created automatically.
skills.confirmDeleteBackup: Are you sure you want to delete this backup? This action cannot be undone.

customInstructions.title: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.description: Manage Codex global custom instructions through ~/.codex/AGENTS.md without touching project-level AGENTS rules.
customInstructions.templatesDescription: Built-in templates are available now and admin-managed templates can be attached later.
customInstructions.currentDescription: Only the PPToken managed block is shown here. Other handwritten global rules are preserved.
customInstructions.editorDescription: Edit on top of a template, then apply only to the PPToken managed block in the global AGENTS file.
customInstructions.editorPlaceholder: Edit the content that will be written into the managed global custom-instructions block
customInstructions.historyDescription: Recent local apply records are kept here so you can roll back quickly.
customInstructions.globalScopeHint: Only manages the PPToken block inside global ~/.codex/AGENTS.md
customInstructions.noManagedContent: There is no PPToken managed block yet.
customInstructions.clearedManagedContent: This action will clear the PPToken managed block.
customInstructions.clearConfirmDescription: This only removes the PPToken managed block from ~/.codex/AGENTS.md and preserves any other global rules you wrote yourself.
customInstructions.templatesLoadFailed: Failed to load remote templates. Falling back to built-in templates.
customInstructions.loadFailedDesc: Try again later, or check your network and refresh the page.
customInstructions.previewDescription: This only updates the PPToken managed block inside ~/.codex/AGENTS.md. It does not touch project code or project-level AGENTS files.
customInstructions.applySuccessDesc: The PPToken managed block was written to ~/.codex/AGENTS.md.
customInstructions.clearSuccessDesc: The PPToken managed block was removed from the global AGENTS file.
customInstructions.rollbackSuccess: Rolled back to the selected history
customInstructions.rollbackSuccessDesc: The selected history version replaced the current PPToken managed block.
customInstructions.rollbackFailed: Failed to roll back custom instructions

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Diagnose system status, clean redundant data, rebuild registry, and recover local runtime issues.
maintenance.diagnoseDesc: Detect OS, architecture, version and registered account count to verify runtime environment.
maintenance.cleanDesc: Remove redundant auth backups, registry backups and stale snapshot entries to free disk space.
maintenance.rebuildDesc: Scan local snapshot files to regenerate registry, fixing corruption or data inconsistency.
maintenance.restartCodexDesc: Terminate and restart the local Codex process to apply config changes or recover from errors.
maintenance.restartConfirmDesc: This will terminate the current Codex process and restart it. Any ongoing operations may be interrupted.
maintenance.cleanResult: Removed: {{authBackups}} auth backups, {{registryBackups}} registry backups, {{staleEntries}} stale entries

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize PPToken appearance, behavior preferences and auto-switch strategy.
settings.apiProxyDesc: Only applies to Codex configuration and status refresh requests.
settings.apiProxyDialogDesc: Configure a dedicated proxy for PPToken network requests.
settings.apiProxySavedDesc: Remote requests for quota and account metadata will use the new proxy route.
settings.refreshIntervalSaveFailedDesc: Kept the current background setting. Please try again later.
settings.thresholdSavedDesc: Auto-switch is off; only the threshold values were updated.
settings.hotspotEnabledDesc: The notch area shows quota percentage; click to return to the main window.
settings.hotspotDisabledDesc: Notch quota display is turned off.
settings.upToDateDesc: You are already on the latest version. No update is needed.
settings.updateCheckFailedDesc: Check your network connection or try again later.
settings.apiProxyDetectFailed: No working proxy address was detected. Please check your VPN or proxy client and enter the correct address manually.
settings.apiProxyTestReachableDirect: Connected to ChatGPT service via direct connection.
settings.apiProxyTestReachableManual: Connected to ChatGPT service via the configured proxy.
settings.apiProxyTestInvalidConfig: The proxy configuration is invalid. Check the proxy URL and scheme.
settings.apiProxyTestClientBuildFailed: Failed to create the proxy client. Check the current proxy settings.
settings.apiProxyTestNetworkFailed: Proxy test failed. Check whether the local proxy is running and whether the network is reachable.
settings.apiProxyTestFailed: Proxy test failed. Please try again later.
settings.thresholdDialogDesc: When the current account's quota percentage drops below the threshold, PPToken will prompt you to switch to the account with the most remaining quota and restart Codex.
settings.accentColorDesc: Customize the primary color for buttons, selections and highlights.
settings.heatmapColorDesc: Customize the primary color for heatmaps and charts in the analytics panel.
settings.refreshIntervalDesc: This setting controls only the quota API (wham/usage) auto-refresh cadence.
settings.hotspotDesc: Show real-time 5-hour and weekly quota percentages at the notch area. Click to return to the main window.
settings.hotspotNotSupported: Only available on Macs with a notch display. This device is not compatible.

topbar.feedbackDesc: Submit issues, suggestions, or unusual behavior to help PPToken improve.
topbar.feedbackSubmittedDesc: Recorded for this local session and ready for backend feedback integration.
topbar.mysteryDesc: A hard-to-explain channel with occasional surprises.
topbar.mysteryInvalidDesc: Check the code and try again.

common.toastErrorGenericDesc: Check your network and proxy status, then try again.
common.toastCopiedDesc: Content was copied to the clipboard. You can paste it now.

update.title: Update Available
update.installBlocked: PPToken cannot install updates from the current location. Reopen it from the real installed app path and try again.
update.installBlockedReadOnlyLocation: PPToken is currently running from a read-only location, so self-update cannot replace the app bundle. Move PPToken to Applications or a real local folder, reopen it from that path, then try again.
update.installBlockedAppTranslocation: PPToken is currently running from macOS App Translocation in a read-only mount, so self-update cannot write the app bundle. Move PPToken to Applications or a real local folder, reopen it from that path, then try again.
update.installPromptDesc: PPToken is currently running from a temporary macOS read-only location, so future updates will fail. Move PPToken into Applications, then reopen it from the real installed app path.
